name: Hustronix Approve Idea (Slack)
description: When user says approve idea {id} in Slack, run full content pipeline

prompts.text:
When a Slack message contains 'approve idea' followed by a number:

1. Extract idea ID
2. Run: python scripts/approve_idea.py {id}
3. Or manually run content-scorer -> content-writer -> design-agent -> design-scorer skills
4. Reply in thread with draft paths, design brief, and scores

Workspace: D:\content
Pick Slack channel in Automations editor.
